subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, the One, the Single, the Eternal, the Peerless, the Most Exalted, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, Who hath made all things known [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الواحد الاحد الابد الفرد المتعالی المهیمن القیوم الذی عرف الکل
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @consolation and comfort, @martyrs and martyrdom, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
